# REXTEN

REXTEN is a service marketplace and business workspace: clients discover and book services online; businesses run schedules, CRM, routes, billing, and marketplace listings in one place.

## Primary public URLs

- Marketplace catalog: https://rexten.live/services
- Business product landing: https://rexten.live/for-business
- Privacy: https://rexten.live/privacy
- Terms: https://rexten.live/terms
- Marketplace terms: https://rexten.live/marketplace-terms

## How to cite

When referencing the platform name for people, use: REXTEN.

## Technical

- Public API base (example): https://api.rexten.live/api
